content: *꾸러미, 일반* {color="gray"} --- **무게:** 47.5 lbs **가치:** 16 GP --- 도둑의 꾸러미에는 다음 물품들이 포함됩니다: [배낭](/212f7f5a1e808113a699d64caf25e4ab?pvs=25), [쇠구슬](/212f7f5a1e808126889beeae773df1a4?pvs=25), [종](/212f7f5a1e8081ecb643e0ab7a9461ca?pvs=25), 10개의 [양초](/212f7f5a1e8081269fd3e48766848cf8?pvs=25), [쇠지렛대](/212f7f5a1e808133bc17e3fe745b4ed7?pvs=25), [덮개 랜턴](/212f7f5a1e80812695b4ee918746e4f8?pvs=25), [기름](/212f7f5a1e8081959762fb1471be0875?pvs=25) 7병, 5일분의 [휴대식량](/212f7f5a1e808112b5ecfacc3de52b5a?pvs=25), [밧줄](/212f7f5a1e8081209061f85619dae8f0?pvs=25), [부싯깃통](/212f7f5a1e80813da4afc2be9884e5a6?pvs=25), [가죽물통](/212f7f5a1e80815da95ac2b204f7677f?pvs=25).
